name: massage-therapy-service-landing-page
description: A professional static landing page for a massage therapy service company

scripts.build:assets: shx cp -r assets dist/ || shx echo 'No assets directory found'
scripts.prebuild: shx rm -rf dist && shx mkdir -p dist/styles dist/scripts
scripts.build:legacy: npm run build:css && npm run build:js && npm run build:html && npm run build:assets
